$comment: Policy for learnings/ privacy. Enforced by scripts/validate-skill.mjs. See references/learning-sanitization.md for the agent-facing rule.
$sourceGameAllowlist_note: sourceGame: frontmatter MUST be one of these abstract codenames. A real studio/title name is itself a leak. Add a new codename here at the START of each new client engagement.
$apiMacroNote: Allowlisted macros are engine/SDK/public-sample/placeholder exports. Any *_API NOT in this list is flagged as a likely client module-export macro (e.g. STUDIONAME_API). Use GAME_API as the neutral placeholder in sanitized learnings. LYRAGAME_API is allowed because Lyra is Epic's public open-source sample.
$denylistNote: OPTIONAL belt-and-suspenders. The PRIMARY defense is the sanitization rule applied at write time (references/learning-sanitization.md) — this list is NOT a substitute. Leave empty unless an engagement wants a hard stop on a specific known token; client-specific denylists do not generalize and must never be the main control.
